ddls:
CREATE TABLE "collectibles" (
  "collectible_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collectible item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the collectible */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the collectible */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the collectible was released */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the collectible belongs to */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition of the collectible */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the collectible */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current status of the collectible (e.g., available, traded) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the collectible's image */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Purchase price of the collectible */,
  "estimated_value" TEXT /* Estimated value of the collectible */,
  "rarity_level" INTEGER /* Rarity level of the collectible (e.g., common, rare, limited edition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collectible_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collectibles_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collectibles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collectibles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collectibles_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the collectible category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., Mint, Good, Fair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Available, Traded, Not for Trade) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the collection */,
  "collectible_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collectible item in the collection */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the collectible was acquired */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the collectible */,
  "acquisition_price" TEXT /* Price paid to acquire the collectible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_collectible_id FOREIGN KEY ("collectible_id") REFERENCES collectibles ("collectible_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wants" (
  "want_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each want entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wants the collectible */,
  "collectible_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collectible item */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the want (1-10) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the want */,
  "max_price" TEXT /* Maximum price the user is willing to pay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("want_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wants_collectible_id FOREIGN KEY ("collectible_id") REFERENCES collectibles ("collectible_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "initiator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the trade */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the recipient of the trade */,
  "collectible_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collectible item being traded */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the trade (e.g., Proposed, Accepted, Completed) */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade took place */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the trade */,
  "trade_price" TEXT /* Price of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_collectible_id FOREIGN KEY ("collectible_id") REFERENCES collectibles ("collectible_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES trade_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_initiator_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Store, Park) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the collectible was released */,
  "collectible_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collectible item */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the collectible was released */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the collectible released */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the collectible at release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_collectible_id FOREIGN KEY ("collectible_id") REFERENCES collectibles ("collectible_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade status (e.g., Proposed, Accepted, Completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trade status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_proposals" (
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade proposal */,
  "initiator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the proposal */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the recipient of the proposal */,
  "collectible_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collectible item proposed for trade */,
  "proposal_date" TEXT /* Date when the proposal was made */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the proposal (e.g., Pending, Accepted, Rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the proposal */,
  "proposed_price" TEXT /* Price proposed for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_proposals_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_proposals_initiator_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_proposals_collectible_id FOREIGN KEY ("collectible_id") REFERENCES collectibles ("collectible_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_proposals_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES trade_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rated_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment about the rated user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_rated_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("rated_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum topic */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the discussion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the topic was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum post */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forum topic */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was made */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
